assertions.description: INCORRECT: The KiCad 5 PCB header (kicad_pcb … (general … (nets 92))) stores the next available net number, not the count of named nets in use. The source file declares only 5 unique net numbers (0, 78, 85, 86, 91) with corresponding names. The analyzer reports net_count=91, which appears to be 92 − 1 from the header value. The actual count of routed/used nets is 5 (or 4 excluding unconnected net 0). This inflated count misrepresents the board's complexity.
